message:
test: migrate tx correctness tests from async to threaded execution

Convert 3 async tests from #[tokio::test] to #[test] with
std::thread::spawn + .join(), removing tokio runtime dependency for
pure determinism checks (commit ordering, compensation idempotency,
concurrent correctness). Test logic unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
